title: Lite Des
description:
优化向整合包，带来强劲的FPS
Optimized modpack, delivers strong FPS
body:
# 一款优化向整合包
- _**轻量级是她的特点！**_
- Vulkan版用[VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)将原版图形api替换为了vulkan，![MSIAfterburner can recognize Vulkan api.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ebcdf6c7eb6c5f6c25dec3fe724bf64116cc2d4.png)
 FPS提升明显，但对sodium系模组不兼容
- 加入了部分改善体验的模组和资源包
- 现已发布OpenGL版，即以sodium系模组为基础的优化整合包，拓展性和兼容性更好
- 其中我用到了非常优秀的材质包：[New Glowing Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-glowing-ores)

<details>
<summary>小建议</summary>
  
1. 可以按需添加、禁用、更新、卸载模组 (可能有对FPS的影响和兼容性问题) 
2. 不建议用于生电存档(≧∇≦)
 
</details>

# An Optimized Modpack
- _**Lightweight is her characteristic!**_
- The Vulkan version uses [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) to replace the vanilla graphics API with Vulkan.,![MSIAfterburner can recognize Vulkan api.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ebcdf6c7eb6c5f6c25dec3fe724bf64116cc2d4.png) delivers a noticeable FPS boost, but it is not compatible with mods from the Sodium series.
- Includes several mods and resource packs that enhance the gameplay experience.
- The OpenGL version has now been released, which is an optimized integration package based on the sodium series of mods, offering better extensibility and compatibility.
- I used an excellent resourcepack in the project:[New Glowing Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-glowing-ores)

<details>
<summary>Tips</summary>

1. You can add, disable, update, or uninstall mods as needed (note that this may affect FPS and compatibility).
2. We would advise caution when using this with "Survival Practical Redstone Machines saves"(≧∇≦)

</details>

  ### **_Thanks for playing!!!(≧∇≦)_**
